title: TradeProposal
description: The merged proposal, assembled deterministically by the orchestrator from an analyst_view (GLM-4.7-Flash) plus an auditor_view (Qwen3.6-27B). Neither model emits this object directly, and neither outputs size, prices, or quantities; those belong to the deterministic Risk Engine. A merged proposal that fails this schema, references a ticker not in the universe, cites a number that disagrees with the live feed, or whose signal cannot be re-derived deterministically is REJECTED and journaled.

symbol.description: Must match a symbol in the resolved universe (universe.yaml). Hallucinated tickers are rejected.

setup_type.description: Must be one of the closed taxonomy in signal_params.yaml: setup_types.

bull_case.description: Strongest honest argument FOR, grounded in the given signals.

bear_case.description: Strongest honest argument AGAINST, written as if you wanted it rejected. A weak bear case is a failure.

uncertainty.description: What would make this wrong? Assumptions, missing/stale data, invalidation conditions.

risk_flags.description: Every risk from the controlled vocabulary that genuinely applies.

risk_score.description: HIGHER = MORE DANGEROUS. Feeds the deterministic veto. Be calibrated, not generous.

action.description: A RECOMMENDATION to the Risk Engine, which may still reject it.

direction.description: Required only when action == enter. (short reserved; long-only in early phases.)

cited_numbers.description: Optional: any indicator values the model referenced, echoed back for the orchestrator to re-check against the Signal Engine. A mismatch beyond tolerance rejects the proposal.
